## Result

Describe the user-visible or technical result.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:native`
- [ ] Documentation updated when public behavior changed
- [ ] No browser data, local state, credentials, or generated artifacts included

## Security impact

Describe changes to Chrome permissions, native messaging, authentication, filesystem access, or CDP behavior. Write `None` when they are unaffected.
